hero_body: One conversation. Routines, meals, gym sessions, your calendar, and a short daily review. kim pays attention to the small stuff so you have room for the rest.
hero_footnote: no passwords · github or google · free while in beta
features_body: kim uses purpose-built tools for each domain, not a giant generic prompt. Each loop is small, testable, and yours to edit.
feature_today_body: Morning plan, evening review, one conversation that runs your day.
feature_routines_body: Wake-ups, workouts, chores, wind-downs — kim tracks and nudges.
feature_calendar_body: Connected to Google Calendar. Move, block, and free up time.
feature_actionables_body: A living inbox of things to do. Kim decides priority with you.
feature_meal_plans_body: Calorie-aware, preference-aware. Draft a day, a week, or a cut.
feature_gym_sessions_body: Structured lifts, tempo runs, recovery days — logged and reviewed.
feature_memories_body: Preferences, constraints, habits — the things kim needs to know.
feature_channels_body: Push, email, telegram — kim reaches you where you already are.
how_it_works_heading: talk to kim like a person.
step_01_body: GitHub or Google. No passwords. One account works across kim1.ai and 1tt.dev.
step_02_body: Plan a week. Build a routine. Draft dinner. Kim uses real tools to make it happen, not just suggest.
step_03_body: Morning plan, evening review, nudges through the day. Your life runs in the background while you work.
final_cta_eyebrow: it only gets better the more you use it
final_cta_body: Sign in in one click. Kim will ask a few questions to understand you, then get out of the way.
